title: Cross-chain test vectors for conformance suite
description: Extend the planned conformance test suite with 10+ cross-chain-specific JSON test vectors covering: proof generated on chain A verified on chain B (should fail without chain ID binding), stale root after relay delay, storage proof verification with valid/invalid block hashes, batch checkpoint inclusion proof, and replay of nullifier across chains. Each vector should include the source chain ID, target chain ID, relay timestamp, and expected verification result. These vectors are essential for any third-party bridge implementer.
